WoRMS taxonomic lookup table

Source: R/data.R
worms_lookup.Rd

Scientific names and higher taxonomy for every AphiaID that appears in the full ICES stomach content database. Built by data-raw/build_worms_lookup.R via the WoRMS API (worrms::wm_record()).

Usage

worms_lookup

Format

A tibble with columns:

aphia_id

WoRMS AphiaID (integer)

scientific_name

Scientific name

rank

Taxonomic rank (e.g. "Species", "Genus")

phylum

Phylum

class

Class

order

Order

family

Family

genus

Genus

On this page
